meaning: n.抚弄,赶走,扔,抛弃,(牛)颈肉,咯咯声,卡盘,解雇vt.轻拍,抛掷,驱逐,丢弃,用卡盘夹住;iv.作咯咯声
examples: The man extended his hand: "I'm Chuck."
Chuck would lecture me, telling me to get a haircut.
Chuck is jobless, homeless, friendless, and suffering from culture shock.
Chicago architect Chuck Bleck has owned rental properties as side investments since the mid-1990s.
He described a conversation Coach Chuck Daly had with Michael Jordan as they formed the team.
